projectDescription: Open-source, self-hostable AI chat platform that connects to 40+ knowledge sources with advanced RAG, Agents, Deep Research, and MCP support, compatible with any LLM.
keyFeatures: AI Chat with support for all major LLMs (OpenAI, Anthropic, Gemini, Ollama, vLLM, etc.)
Custom AI Agents with unique instructions, knowledge, and tool access
Best-in-class hybrid search + knowledge graph RAG over connected documents
40+ data source connectors (Confluence, Slack, GitHub, Google Drive, Notion, Jira, etc.)
Deep Research for multi-step agentic document analysis
MCP (Model Context Protocol) support for extending agent actions
Code Interpreter for data analysis, graphs, and file generation
Web Search integration (Google PSE, Exa, Serper, Firecrawl)
Enterprise security: SSO (OIDC/SAML/OAuth2), RBAC, document permissioning
Multi-tenant support with per-tenant task isolation
One-command Docker deployment with Kubernetes and Terraform support
Community Edition (MIT) and Enterprise Edition feature tiers
publicApiSurface: POST /api/chat/send-message — Send a chat message to an assistant
POST /api/manage/connector — Create a new data source connector
POST /api/query/stream-answer-with-quote — Stream search answer with citations
POST /api/persona — Create a custom AI assistant
